name: Spinach, Mushrooms, and Brown Rice with Chees
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Oil an 8-inch square baking dish.
3. Heat olive oil and butter in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat.
4. Add garlic and mushrooms; cook, stirring occasionally, for about 1 minute.
5. Add spinach; cook, stirring, until wilted, about 2 minutes.
6. Stir in pepper, cheddar cheese, and cottage cheese. Set aside.
7. Spread rice evenly on the bottom of the baking dish.
8. Spoon the spinach-cheese mixture over the rice.
9. Top with mozzarella slices and sprinkle with paprika.
10. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes. Finish under broiler for about 1 minute, or until cheese is bubbly and lightly browned.
11. Cut into squares and serve hot.
